This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-rx78-29qr-5hq8. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.5.2 contains a path traversal vulnerability in maintenance task execution that allows workspace-derived service paths to influence trash command selection. Attackers can execute unintended local executables from operator-unintended paths during maintenance operations by manipulating workspace-derived environment paths.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2w22-3f6x-3hf4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T20:40:58Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2w22-3f6x-3hf4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2w22-3f6x-3hf4"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-16T19:17:04Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T21:32:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-rx78-29qr-5hq8", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53865", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-arbitrary-command-execution-via-workspace-derived-service-path", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2w22-3f6x-3hf4"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Workspace-derived service PATH could influence trash command selection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T20:41:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2w22-3f6x-3hf4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.5.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T20:40:58Z"}
